title: Creating a survey but cant duplicate multiple questions at a time
excerpt: I am creating a survey and need to copy a number of questions already asked and paste them into the survey in a later position, this includes a number of questions with conditions.  Does anyone know if there is a way of …

posts.author: MikeJ (Mike James)
posts.cookedHtml: I am creating a survey and need to copy a number of questions already asked and paste them into the survey in a later position, this includes a number of questions with conditions. Does anyone know if there is a way of duplicating multiple questions at a time and pasting them into the same document?
